name: Appetizer Egg Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage and sauté pork, onion, and cabbage in hot oil until lightly browned.
2. Stir in mushrooms, bean sprouts, currants, almonds, and ginger; sauté for 1 minute.
3. Dissolve cornstarch in 2 tablespoons water, then combine with sherry, soy sauce, and ginger. Add to pork mixture and bring to a boil. Remove from heat and cool.
4. Cut egg roll wrappers into half rectangles. Place a heaping teaspoon of pork mixture on one end of the rectangle. Moisten long edges and roll up. Press edges together to seal.
5. Refrigerate prepared egg rolls for several hours or overnight, or freeze for several days before frying.
6. Heat oil to 375°F (190°C) and fry egg rolls in batches until golden brown and crisp on all sides. Fry about 4-5 minutes; turn once.
7. Drain on paper towels and keep warm while frying remaining rolls. Serve with warm ginger apricot sauce.
Ginger Apricot Sauce:
1. Combine apricots, sugar, ginger, and salt with 3/4 cup water in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer uncovered for 5 minutes.
2. Pour mixture into a blender or food processor, add lemon juice, cover, and process until smooth. Serve warm.
